operator: PLS Parkleitsystem Luzern AG (city-wide aggregator covering multiple operators)

endpoints.cors: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — usable directly from browser / frontend code
endpoints.response_shape: { status, data: { parkings: { <id>: { description, vacancy, capacity, datestamp, maintenance, opened } }, groups: { north|south|messe: { description, vacancy, capacity } }, time } }

fields.data.parkings: object keyed by parking ID. Each entry has: description (string), vacancy (int, free spaces), capacity (int, total spaces), datestamp (ISO 8601 per-parking, with timezone offset), maintenance (boolean), opened (boolean)
fields.data.groups: object keyed by group (north / south / messe). Each has description, vacancy, capacity — aggregated counts across the parkings in that group
fields.data.time: ISO 8601 timestamp of the overall feed snapshot

endpoints.notes: Frontend-facing endpoint — not an officially documented public API. The first 7 parkings below are publicly displayed on pls-luzern.ch; the remaining 9 are present in the feed only. SP05 covers Bahnhofparking P1 and P2 combined — the website splits them visually using a fixed ~85% / ~15% JavaScript estimate, but the endpoint itself returns only the combined SP05 value. Capacities and max heights below are sourced from third-party listing sites (parking-luzern.ch, zentralplus.ch, etc.) since pls-luzern.ch is JS-rendered.

parkings.name: Bahnhofparking P1+P2
parkings.notes: Single feed entry covers P1 and P2 combined. The pls-luzern.ch website splits these client-side using a fixed ~85% / ~15% JavaScript estimate; the endpoint itself does not.

parkings.name: Parkplatz Sportgebäude
parkings.notes: Outdoor lot adjacent to AP01 (Parkhaus Sportgebäude) on the Allmend; capacity figure is from the live feed.

parkings.name: Parkplatz Allmend/Messe P2
parkings.notes: Outdoor lot. Feed has been reporting capacity=0 / vacancy=0; likely only active during Messe Luzern events.
